medialive.channel.scte20sourcesettings.C.Description: If upconvert, 608 data is both passed through the "608 compatibility bytes" fields of the 708 wrapper as well as translated into 708. Any 708 data present in the source content is discarded.

medialive.channel.scte20sourcesettings.S.Description: Specifies the 608/708 channel number within the video track from which to extract captions.
